my_bins.title: Your bins
my_bins.empty_description: Create your first bin and start coding

generate.placeholder: Describe what you want to build…
generate.hint: Enter to generate · Shift+Enter for newline
generate.suggestion_3: Python script to parse a CSV file
generate.suggestion_4: HTML landing page with CSS animations

card.delete_description: This will permanently delete the bin and all its files. This cannot be undone.
card.unlink_description: You'll be removed from the collaborators list. You can still access it if the link is shared with you again.

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: Your anonymous presence across all bins.
identity.name_callout: Your avatar is procedurally generated from your name and chosen colors. Change your name and your avatar changes with it.
identity.color_hint: Shown to collaborators in real time.
identity.color_callout: The dark-theme color is applied over dark backgrounds — pick something bright. The light-theme color is used over white backgrounds — go for a deeper tone. Both show up on your cursor, line highlight, and avatar.
identity.uuid_hint: This never changes and identifies you across bins.

keybindings.title: Keybindings
keybindings.capture_change_hint: Press a different combination to replace

ai_completions.title: AI Capabilities
ai_completions.key_notice: Your API key is stored locally in this browser and never sent to any server other than the AI provider.
ai_completions.features_callout: Enables inline code completions, AI-suggested names for bins and files, one-click code explanations, and bin generation from natural language prompts.

reset.title: Reset all settings
reset.description: Restore all preferences to their default values. Your identity (UUID, name, colors) will not be affected.
reset.modal_description: This will restore appearance, editor, keybindings, Prettier, and AI settings to their defaults. Your identity will be preserved.

forget.title: Right to be forgotten
forget.description: Permanently delete your profile and all your bins from the database. This cannot be undone.
forget.modal_description: This will permanently delete your profile and all your bins. Type <phrase>forget me</phrase> below to confirm.

import_export.title: Import & Export
import_export.share_settings_description: Copy a link with your current settings. Anyone who opens it can apply your configuration.
import_export.apply_settings_description: Paste a settings link from another user to apply their configuration.
import_export.export_session_description: Generate a one-time link to move your identity to another device. Expires in 15 minutes.

hints: waiting for the coffee to finish…

bins.search_placeholder: Search by title, ID, or author…

users.delete_description: This will permanently delete the user profile. Their bins will remain but become authorless.

global_dropzone.hint: Drop to create a new bin
global_dropzone.hint_sub: A new bin will be created with this file

forgotten.title: You've been forgotten
forgotten.description: You requested to be removed from this app. Your data has been permanently deleted.

profile.not_found_description: This user doesn't exist or hasn't been seen yet.

bins.title: Bins
bins.empty_description: This user hasn't published any bins yet.

shared_with_me.title: Shared with you by this user

bin_header.locked_action: Click to allow editing for guests
bin_header.locked_guest: Only the author can edit this bin
bin_header.unlocked_guest: Anyone with the link can edit
bin_header.fork_description: A copy of this bin will be created with all its files. You will be the author of the new bin.
bin_header.fork_disabled: Forking is only available for public bins
bin_header.admin_override: You can edit this bin because you're an admin
bin_header.visibility_public_desc: Anyone can find and view this bin
bin_header.visibility_unlisted_desc: Only people with the link can view
bin_header.visibility_private_desc: Only you can access this bin
bin_header.share_disabled: Sharing is disabled for private bins

status_bar.nudge_tooltip: Send a nudge to all collaborators

tips_widget.title: Tips
tips_widget.show_again: Show tips when opening the editor

instant-collaboration.title: Instant collaboration
instant-collaboration.body: Share the URL — anyone with the link can edit in real time, no sign-up required.

multiple-files.title: Multiple files
multiple-files.body: Use the {{icon:plus}} button in the tab bar to add files. Each file can have its own language.

run-your-code.title: Run your code
run-your-code.body: JS, HTML, Markdown and more have live runners. Click the play button in the status bar.

command-palette.title: Command palette
command-palette.body: Press {{shortcut:command_palette}} to open the command palette and access all actions quickly.

fork-any-bin.title: Fork any bin
fork-any-bin.body: Found something interesting? Hit Fork to get your own editable copy instantly.

ai-completions.title: AI completions
ai-completions.body: Connect your own API key in Settings to enable inline AI completions in the editor.

embed-anywhere.title: Embed anywhere
embed-anywhere.body: Every bin has an embed URL — drop it in any page for a read-only syntax-highlighted view.

your-keys-your-data.title: Your keys, your data
your-keys-your-data.body: API keys never leave your device. Everything is stored in your browser's localStorage.

drag-and-drop-files.title: Drop files in
drag-and-drop-files.body: Drag any local file onto the editor to replace content, append it, or open it as a new tab.

npm-packages.title: npm packages
npm-packages.body: Open the {{icon:package-2}} Packages panel to search and install any npm package for the JS runner.

rename-file-tab.title: Rename files
rename-file-tab.body: Double-click any file tab to rename it — no menu needed.

reorder-tabs.title: Reorder tabs
reorder-tabs.body: Drag file tabs to rearrange them — drop them anywhere in the tab bar.

download-zip.title: Download your bin
download-zip.body: Use the {{icon:download}} button in the header to download the current file or the full bin as a ZIP.

bin-visibility.title: Control visibility
bin-visibility.body: Set your bin to {{icon:globe}} Public, {{icon:link}} Unlisted, or {{icon:eye-off}} Private from the header.

format-code.title: Format your code
format-code.body: Press {{shortcut:format_code}} to auto-format the current file using your Prettier settings.

http-runner.title: HTTP runner
http-runner.body: Create a `.http` file and run real HTTP requests with headers, variables, and multiple endpoints — no external client needed.

mermaid-diagrams.title: Diagrams as code
mermaid-diagrams.body: Create a `.mermaid` file and write flowcharts, sequences, and Gantt charts that render live in the preview panel.

share-settings.title: Share your config
share-settings.body: In Settings → Import & Export, copy your full configuration as a link — anyone can apply it instantly.

session-export.title: Move to a new device
session-export.body: Generate a one-time session link in Settings → Import & Export to transfer your identity to another browser or device.

nudge.title: Nudge your team
nudge.body: Hit the **Nudge** button in the status bar to send a playful alert to all collaborators — just like the old days.

click-to-follow-peer.title: Follow a collaborator
click-to-follow-peer.body: Click any collaborator's avatar in the status bar to jump straight to their cursor — even if they're on a different file.

cursor-color.title: Your color, your identity
cursor-color.body: Pick your cursor color in Settings — it shows on your avatar, cursor, and active line so collaborators always recognize you.

explore-settings.title: Make it yours
explore-settings.body: Press {{shortcut:settings}} to open Settings — set your display name, pick your colors, choose a theme, and more.

move-search-widget.title: Drag the Finder
move-search-widget.body: Find panel in the way? Drag it by the title bar to move it wherever it's most comfortable.

no-account-required.title: No account needed
no-account-required.body: Bins is fully anonymous — no sign-up, no login, just open the app and start creating.

right-to-be-forgotten.title: Right to forget
right-to-be-forgotten.body: Want a clean slate? Open {{shortcut:settings}} and hit **Forget me** to permanently delete your profile and all your bins.

explain-this.title: Explain This
explain-this.body: Hit {{icon:book-open}} **Explain** in the status bar and the AI will tell you what the current file does.

drop_overlay.hint: Drop to choose what to do with this file
drop_overlay.append_desc: Add to the end of the file
drop_overlay.new_tab_desc: Open as a new file in this bin

http.no_proxy: VITE_PROXY_URL is not configured. Add it to your .env file to send requests.

strudel.idle_description:
Write rhythms and melodies as patterns.
One cycle at a time.

maintenance.title: We'll be right back
maintenance.description: We're doing some maintenance. Hang tight.

embed.private_description: Only the author can view this bin.
embed.not_found_description: This bin doesn't exist or has been deleted.
